title: Better Default
description: Better Default is a small and lightweight modpack designed for players who want to enhance their vanilla Minecraft experience without overwhelming modifications.
body:
**Better Default** is a small and lightweight modpack designed for players who want to enhance their vanilla Minecraft experience without overwhelming modifications. With over 100+ carefully selected mods, it aims to improve the game’s quality of life while preserving the core vanilla gameplay.

**Key Features:**

**Quality of Life Enhancements:** It includes mods that add convenience and enjoyment to your gameplay. These mods don’t drastically alter the game but provide subtle improvements.
 

**Maintaining Vanilla Feel:** The modpack ensures that the vanilla mechanics remain untouched. It enhances aspects like exploration, multiplayer, and small gameplay tweaks.
 

**Recommended Resource Packs and Shaders:** To make the most out of this version, consider using the Default + Resource Pack and Complementary Shaders - Reimagined included in the modpack.
